prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7158名、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-0.94%）、江西省考生总数略有增加、抖音高热反映关注度上升、声誉偏负面轻微影响，以及材料/计算机等优势学科持续吸引考生，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅上移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约7148名，区间6648–7648名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated around 7003→7131→6678→7061→7158, with an overall range of 6700–7200 in recent years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7158, with a fluctuation range of about 480 over the past five years, showing overall stability. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category was 98, 98, 97, and 101 from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 106 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 105, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 0.94%, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main List has been stable around 35th in recent years (33rd in 2021, 36th in 2022, 35th in 2023, 35th in 2024, 35th in 2025, 35th in 2026), placing it among the top-tier 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (falsified transcripts and plagiarized dissertations), which may have a minor negative impact on application psychology. It has extremely high popularity on Douyin, ranking 1st overall (high heat), with short video exposure far exceeding other universities, reflecting continuously rising application attention. No abnormal signals related to University of Science and Technology Beijing were found in historical admission records. It has A+ in Metallurgical Engineering, A+ in Materials Science and Engineering, A+ in History of Science and Technology, and A- in Environmental Science and Engineering. Among these, Materials Science and Engineering and Metallurgical Engineering are at the national top level, highly relevant to the university's Physics Category majors (such as Materials, Mechanical, Automation, etc.), strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended. Materials Science and Engineering (A+), though part of the broader biology, chemistry, environment, and materials category, is at the top level at this university. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination students in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category + History Category total about 472,480), intensifying competition slightly. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 429 points, down from 448 points in 2024, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or score line adjustments, not included in ranking predictions. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, strongly attracting students from Jiangxi Province. The university's enrollment in Jiangxi Province is relatively small (about 100 students), and cross-province application enthusiasm is greatly influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7158, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-0.94%), a slight increase in the total number of Jiangxi Province students, high Douyin popularity reflecting rising attention, a minor negative reputation impact, and the continuous attraction of advantageous disciplines like Materials and Computer Science, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly rise from 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7148, with a range of 6648–7648.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)

- Safety Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7148, with a range of 6648–7648. For rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 6800), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science, High-Precision and Advanced Class). For rankings in the middle part (about 6800–7300), prioritize Tier 2 majors (Automation, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics). For rankings in the lower part (after about 7300), it is recommended to secure Tier 3 majors as a backup (Mechanical, Materials Regular Class, Energy and Power). The university's Materials Science and Engineering (A+) is nationally top-tier, while Computer Science and Automation have excellent employment prospects. It is advisable to choose based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1625 → 1871 → 1659 → 1907 → 1838, with recent fluctuations around 1600–1900. The 2025 baseline is about 1838, and the overall ranking has shifted backward by about 200 places in the last 3 years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jiangxi from 2021 to 2025 was 16, 16, 17, 17, 16 respectively; the 2026 plan is 17, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 6.25%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked about 35th in the Soft Science main ranking, belonging to top-tier 211 universities, with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates as well; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), but the university is primarily focused on science and engineering, with a small liberal arts enrollment, so the reputation impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 1st overall (high heat), but the main content focuses on science and engineering, with relatively low attention to liberal arts; its advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (materials, metallurgy, etc.), with no A-class disciplines in liberal arts, but the Social Science Experimental Class (law direction) can leverage the university's overall 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Business Administration (accounting, finance) shows divided social sentiment (wait-and-see), Foreign Language and Literature shows general social sentiment (wait-and-see); the total number of candidates in Jiangxi in 2026 has increased, with the history category accounting for about 43.6%, estimated at about 207,000, a slight increase from 206,000 in 2025; the provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 486 points, up from 463 points in 2024, reflecting intensified competition; Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the university's liberal arts enrollment in Jiangxi is only 16–17, extremely small, so ranking fluctuations are greatly influenced by individual candidate application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1838, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+6.25%), a slight increase in history category candidates in Jiangxi, divided popularity of law and other liberal arts majors, and the appeal of Beijing as a region, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for history category in 2026 will shift slightly backward (competition slightly intensifies) from the 2025 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1922, and a range of 1622–2222.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1922, range 1622–2222. The university only enrolls 17 liberal arts students in Jiangxi, so rankings fluctuate significantly. Candidates with rankings in the upper part of the range (within about 1700) can aim for Tier 1 Business Administration; those in the middle part (about 1700–2000) should focus on Tier 2 Social Science Experimental Class (law direction); those in the lower part (after about 2000) should use Tier 3 Foreign Language and Literature as a safety option. The law direction has clear advantages for civil service exams, and Business Administration includes a dual bachelor's degree program. It is recommended to choose based on career plans.
